description_for_human: Extract structured JSON from any text or URL using GPT-4o-mini. Provide a JSON Schema and get back clean, structured data.
description_for_model: Use this tool to extract structured JSON data from unstructured text or web URLs using GPT-4o-mini via OpenRouter. Provide raw text or a URL along with a JSON Schema defining the output structure. The API will return a JSON object conforming to your schema. Requires x402 USDC payment ($0.10) on Base mainnet per extraction. Max input: 20,000 characters.

tools.name: extract_structured_data
tools.description: Extract structured JSON from unstructured text or a URL using GPT-4o-mini. Provide either 'url' or 'text', plus a JSON Schema describing the output. Returns a JSON object conforming to your schema. Costs $0.10 USDC via x402 on Base mainnet.

url.description: URL to fetch and extract structured data from. The API will scrape and clean the page content automatically.

text.description: Raw text to extract structured data from (max 20,000 characters). Provide either 'url' or 'text', not both.

schema.description: JSON Schema defining the output structure. The LLM will return a JSON object conforming to this schema.

data.description: Extracted data conforming to the provided JSON Schema
